title: Surgeon Vacancy at Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services:
Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services!
